mapper.insert: insert into store_dish (store_id, dish_id, status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{storeId}, #{dishId}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select sd.dish_id from store_dish sd left join dish d on sd.dish_id = d.id where sd.store_id = #{storeId} and sd.status = 1 and d.category_id = #{categoryId} and d.status = 1 and (d.dish_scope = 1 or (d.dish_scope is null and d.store_id is null))
mapper.insert: insert into store_dish (store_id, dish_id, status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{storeId}, #{dishId}, #{status}, 0, 0, now(), now()) on duplicate key update status = values(status), update_time = now(), update_user = 0
